title: Browse colleges with search and filters
description: A guest can search and filter engineering colleges and see matching results update on the discovery page.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Fill in the college search field with engineering
Select a state filter
Select a fees filter
Select a rating filter
Verify matching college results are displayed

title: Search and filter colleges before opening a detail page
description: A guest user can search, filter, and open a college detail page, then view the college overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Type a college name or keyword into the search field
Apply a state, fees, or rating filter
Scroll to load more colleges
Open a college from the results
Verify the college detail page is displayed
Verify the college overview information is displayed

title: Open a college detail page from discovery
description: A guest can open a college from the listing and view the college detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Open a college from the results list
Verify the college detail page is displayed
Verify the college overview content is displayed

title: View college details with overview and supporting sections
description: A user can open a college detail page and switch between overview, courses, placements, reviews, and Q&A content.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Open a college from the results
Switch to the courses section
Switch to the placements section
Switch to the reviews section
Switch to the Q&A section
Verify the college sections are displayed
Verify reviews and discussion content are displayed

title: Load more colleges while scrolling
description: A guest can continue browsing colleges as more results load when reaching the end of the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Scroll to the bottom of the results list
Verify additional college results are displayed

title: View college detail sections
description: A guest can read the main college detail sections that support evaluation before deciding to save or compare.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Open a college from the results list
Verify the college courses section is displayed
Verify the placements section is displayed
Verify the reviews and questions sections are displayed

title: Refine college results with rating and fee filters
description: A user can narrow the college list using quick filters and see the updated results list.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Apply a quick rating filter
Apply a quick fee filter
Verify the college results list is updated
Verify filtered colleges are displayed

title: Prompt sign in for gated college actions
description: A guest trying to save or contribute from a college detail page is prompted to sign in before continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Open a college from the results list
Click the save action for the college
Verify a sign-in prompt is displayed
Click the review or question action
Verify the authentication modal is displayed

title: Log in from the authentication modal
description: A user can sign in through the modal and reach the authenticated experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in flow from the header
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the authenticated experience is displayed

title: Add colleges to a comparison and review them side by side
description: A user can add multiple colleges to compare and view their fees, ratings, and placement information together.

steps.description: Navigate to /compare
Search for a college to add to comparison
Add a second college to comparison
Verify the comparison table is displayed
Verify multiple colleges are shown in the side-by-side comparison

title: Compare multiple colleges side by side
description: A user can build a comparison of 2 to 4 colleges and review them together on the compare page.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Open the compare action for the first college
Open the compare action for the second college
Open the compare action for the third college
Navigate to /compare
Verify the selected colleges are displayed in side-by-side comparison

title: View the saved shortlist
description: A signed-in user can open the saved list and see saved colleges displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /saved
Verify the saved colleges list is displayed

title: Post a review on a college detail page
description: An authenticated user can submit a review and see it appear in the reviews thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /colleges
Open a college from the results list
Submit a review with a rating and comment
Verify the new review is displayed in the reviews thread

title: Submit a review on a college detail page
description: A signed-in user can post a review with a rating and comment and see it appear in the reviews thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /colleges
Open a college from the results
Switch to the reviews section
Enter a rating and comment for a new review
Submit the review
Verify the new review appears in the reviews thread

title: Remove a college from saved and see the list update
description: A signed-in user can remove a college from the shortlist and see it disappear from the saved list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /saved
Remove a college from the saved list
Verify the removed college is no longer displayed

title: Use the demo account to enter the app
description: A user can use the demo account option to access the authenticated experience immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in flow from the header
Choose the demo account option
Verify the authenticated experience is displayed

title: Load more college results while browsing
description: A user can scroll through the college listing and load additional colleges without leaving the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Scroll to the bottom of the results
Verify more college results are displayed
Verify the listing remains on the colleges page

title: Save a comparison after signing in
description: A signed-in user can save a college comparison for later review.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /compare
Save the current comparison
Verify a saved comparison confirmation is visible

title: Build a full comparison set up to four colleges
description: A user can add up to four colleges to the comparison set and see all selected colleges in the table.

steps.description: Navigate to /compare
Search for and add a first college to comparison
Search for and add a second college to comparison
Search for and add a third college to comparison
Search for and add a fourth college to comparison
Verify four colleges are shown in the comparison table
Verify comparison metrics are displayed for each selected college

title: Post a question on a college detail page
description: An authenticated user can submit a question and see it appear in the discussion thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /colleges
Open a college from the results list
Submit a question
Verify the new question is displayed in the discussion thread

title: Open a saved college from the shortlist
description: A signed-in user can open a saved college from the shortlist and view its detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /saved
Open a saved college
Verify the college detail page is displayed

title: Remove a college from comparison
description: A user can remove one college from the compare set and see the comparison update.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Open the compare action for the first college
Open the compare action for the second college
Navigate to /compare
Remove one college from the comparison
Verify the removed college is no longer displayed in the comparison

title: Delete a saved comparison
description: A signed-in user can delete a previously saved comparison from the compare page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /compare
Delete a saved comparison
Verify the saved comparison is no longer displayed

title: Switch between sign-in and registration views
description: A user can switch between sign-in and registration options in the authentication modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in flow from the header
Switch to the registration view
Switch back to the sign-in view
Verify both authentication views are available

title: Delete a saved comparison after signing in
description: A signed-in user can remove a previously saved comparison from their saved comparisons.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /compare
Search for and add two colleges to comparison
Save the current comparison
Delete the saved comparison
Verify the saved comparison is removed
Verify no deleted comparison remains in the saved comparisons area

title: Browse and search courses
description: A guest can search the courses listing and find matching course entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /courses
Fill in the course search field with engineering
Verify matching course results are displayed

title: Browse careers and open a career detail page
description: This verifies that a guest user can browse the static careers catalog and open a detailed career page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /careers
Click the link for a career card
Verify the career detail page is displayed
Verify career content is displayed

title: Open course information and navigate to related college discovery
description: A user can browse courses, open a course-related college view, and continue into college discovery content.

steps.description: Navigate to /courses
Open a course item
Open the related college information
Verify the related college information is displayed
Verify a college discovery page or college detail page is displayed

title: Browse exams and open an exam detail page
description: This verifies that a guest user can browse the static exams catalog and open a detailed exam page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /exams
Click the link for an exam card
Verify the exam detail page is displayed
Verify exam content is displayed

title: Open linked college information from a course
description: A guest can open a course entry and view the linked college information from that course.

steps.description: Navigate to /courses
Open a course entry
Verify the linked college information is displayed

title: View a career detail page from the careers catalog
description: This verifies that selecting a career from the static catalog opens a readable detail page for that career.

steps.description: Navigate to /careers
Click the link for a different career card
Verify the career detail page is displayed
Verify career-specific details are displayed

title: View an exam detail page from the exams catalog
description: This verifies that selecting an exam from the static catalog opens a readable detail page for that exam.

steps.description: Navigate to /exams
Click the link for a different exam card
Verify the exam detail page is displayed
Verify exam-specific details are displayed

title: Show an empty state when no colleges match
description: A guest sees an empty state when search and filters produce no matching college results.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Fill in the college search field with a unique non-matching term
Select restrictive filters that keep the result set empty
Verify an empty state message is displayed

title: Browse exam listings and open an exam detail page
description: A guest can browse static exam content and open an exam detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /exams
Open an exam from the list
Verify the exam detail page is displayed
Verify exam detail content is displayed

title: Show an empty state when no college results match
description: A user who enters a restrictive search or filter can see that no college results are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /colleges
Type a unique unmatched search term into the search field
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify no college results are displayed

title: Open a second exam detail page from the catalog
description: This verifies that users can move between the exams listing and different exam detail pages without leaving the static content flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /exams
Click the link for an exam card
Return to the exams listing
Click the link for another exam card
Verify the exam detail page is displayed
Verify exam-specific content is displayed

title: Browse career paths and open a career detail page
description: A guest can browse static career content and open a career detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /careers
Open a career path from the list
Verify the career detail page is displayed
Verify career detail content is displayed

title: Navigate from support content back to discovery
description: A guest can move from supporting content to college discovery content through linked navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /exams
Open an exam from the list
Navigate to the related college discovery content
Verify the colleges discovery page is displayed

title: See an error for invalid sign-in credentials
description: A user entering invalid credentials sees an authentication error in the modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in flow from the header
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid password
Submit the sign-in form
Verify an authentication error message is displayed

title: Show an empty state for an empty saved list
description: A signed-in user with no saved colleges sees an empty state on the shortlist page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /saved
Verify an empty state message is displayed

title: Browse exam details from the exams listing
description: A user can open an exam from the exams listing and view the static exam detail content.

steps.description: Navigate to /exams
Open an exam item
Verify the exam detail page is displayed
Verify exam detail content is displayed

title: Browse career details from the careers listing
description: A user can open a career from the careers listing and view the static career detail content.

steps.description: Navigate to /careers
Open a career item
Verify the career detail page is displayed
Verify career detail content is displayed
